summary: Improves one-click update restart reliability and adds a real previous-version release rehearsal before publishing.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: Planban now uses a stricter local release rehearsal before publishing updates, and the restart handoff has been hardened so the updated app can come back cleanly after a one-click update.
